title: Energy efficiency of GPU partition
difficulty_justification: Sequential plan: facility.query_node_power for the gpu-partition nodes, telemetry.query_timeseries for their GPU FLOPS counters over the last 24 h, then a single arithmetic step yielding GFLOPS/W.
query_text: What is the average energy efficiency (GFLOPS per Watt) of jobs running on the gpu partition over the last 24 hours? I want one cluster-level number.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Across the gpu partition over the last 24 h the partition-weighted mean is 2.3 GFLOPS/W (12 nodes, 38.4 TFLOPS sustained at 16.7 kW).

checkpoints.description: facility.query_node_power returns 24-hour power for gpu-partition nodes.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains facility.query_node_power scoped to gpu-partition nodes

checkpoints.description: telemetry.query_timeseries returns gpu FLOPS counters for the same window.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains telemetry.query_timeseries with a flops-style metric
